---
name: visualizer/template
description: JSON schema for prompts.json output
---

# prompts.json Schema

```json
{
  "meta": {
    "project": "project_name",
    "version": "1.0",
    "default_image_provider": "seedream",
    "default_video_provider": "seedance"
  },

  "character_anchors": {
    "anchor_name": "fixed description for consistency across shots"
  },

  "style_anchor": "Detailed style description (50-100 words) generated by model based on project theme/mood/era. Covers: render style, color palette, lighting, texture, reference aesthetics, exclusions (NOT xxx). Appended to ALL prompts globally.",

  "shots": {
    "SHOT_001": {
      "id": "SHOT_001",
      "strategy": "image_then_video",

      "image_prompt": {
        "provider": "seedream",
        "prompt": "complete optimized prompt for image generation",
        "negative_prompt": "",
        "reference_images": ["character_id", "scene_id"],
        "aspect_ratio": "9:16",
        "image_size": "2K"
      },

      "video_prompt": {
        "provider": "seedance",
        "prompt": "complete optimized prompt for video generation, including motion, opening state and closing state for continuity",
        "opening_state": "description of the video's starting visual state (must match previous shot's ending)",
        "closing_state": "description of the video's ending visual state (must match next shot's opening)",
        "duration_seconds": 3,
        "aspect_ratio": "9:16",
        "first_frame_ref": "assets/image/shot_001.png"
      }
    },

    "SHOT_002": {
      "id": "SHOT_002",
      "strategy": "text_to_video",

      "image_prompt": null,

      "video_prompt": {
        "provider": "seedance",
        "prompt": "complete video prompt",
        "duration_seconds": 5,
        "aspect_ratio": "9:16",
        "first_frame_ref": null
      }
    }
  }
}
```

## Field Rules

- `strategy`:
  - `"image_then_video"` — Generate a keyframe image first, confirm, then generate video (recommended)
  - `"text_to_video"` — Generate video directly from text
  - `"image_only"` — Generate static image only
- `provider`: The specific model to use (`seedream` | `seedance` | `minimax` | `sora`)
- `prompt`: Complete prompt optimized for the target model
- `first_frame_ref`: When using the image_then_video strategy, points to the generated keyframe image path
- `opening_state`: Description of the video's starting visual state; must connect with the previous shot's ending
- `closing_state`: Description of the video's ending visual state; must connect with the next shot's opening
- `reference_images`: Array of reference image IDs, corresponding to `assets/design/{id}.png`. The generate_image tool will automatically load these reference images and use image_to_image mode for generation, ensuring character/scene consistency. Reference images must be generated first via the generate_reference tool.
- `character_anchors`: Fixed descriptions of characters/objects, referenced during prompt generation
- `style_anchor`: Detailed style description (50-100 words) generated by the model during the design phase, covering render style, color, lighting, texture, exclusions, and other dimensions. Globally appended to every prompt to ensure visual consistency across the entire piece. See designer/SKILL.md for details.
